ruledOut: wrong-line fix: pre-fix blob fails PyYAML at exactly line 178 col 42 (the colon after 'bootstrap' in the unquoted step name); post-fix blob parses clean — genuine red->green on the exact defect
semantic drift via quoting: parsed post-fix name value is byte-identical to the pre-fix plain-scalar text; only surrounding double quotes added; env and run lines untouched
escape reinterpretation: name string contains no backslashes, embedded double quotes, or ${{ }} expressions that double-quoted YAML style could reinterpret
second latent parse bug: all four workflow files on the branch parse OK; all 13 other step names in publish.yml avoid ': ' (they use '--' separators) — line 178 was the sole offender
scope creep: diff vs merge-base is exactly 1 file, 1 line changed, 1 commit
attribution/secrets: no AI attribution in the branch commits; no secret values in the diff (only the pre-existing secrets.NPM_TOKEN reference in unchanged context)

the silent-failure claim itself: observed live — every push since PR #131 (incl. docs-only) produced a zero-job failed publish.yml run (run 29196755547 inspected: jobCount 0), the unparseable-file signature; ADR-0051 quiet-failure class confirmed, not folklore
